popularStory.headline: Menteith
popularStory.description:
Sir John Menteith (c. 1275 - c. 1323) was a Scottish nobleman.

He was born John Stewart in Ruskie, Stirling, Scotland.

His father was Walter "Bailloch" Stewart, 5th Earl of Menteith, and mother Mary …

zh.Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Menteith -Lord of Arran於1271年出生在英國蘇格蘭時，他的父親Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith53歲，母親Mary Menteith47歲。他於1295年之前與Helen-nic-Gartnait of Mar在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1305年登記服兵役。他去世於1323年在英國蘇格蘭培爾享年52歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Menteith -Lord of Arran于1271年出生在英国苏格兰时，他的父亲Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith53岁，母亲Mary Menteith47岁。他于1295年之前与Helen-nic-Gartnait of Mar在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1305年登记服兵役。他去世于1323年在英国苏格兰培爾享年52岁，埋葬在苏格兰雷福福爾佩斯利。

nameMeanings.name: Menteith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the earldom and province of Menteith in Perthshire, named in Gaelic as ‘hill pasture (above) the Teith’, from monadh ‘hill pasture’ + Teith, a river name of obscure origin. This name was introduced to Ulster at the time of the Plantation in the 17th century, where it is now quite numerous in certain areas, particularly Tyrone.

variants.name: Montooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Monteith  .

variants.name: Mantooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish Monteith orMantach, a nickname from Gaelic manntach ‘stammering’(also ‘toothless’ in Irish), of which one early Welsh recorded form isMantath.

variants.name: Montieth
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): variant of   Monteith   This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Menteith -Lord of Arran was born in 1271, in Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith, was 53 and his mother, Mary Menteith, was 47. He married Helen-nic-Gartnait of Mar before 1295, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1305. He died in 1323, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 52, and was buried in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Menteith -Lord of Arran est né en 1271, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Mary Menteith, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Helen-nic-Gartnait of Mar avant 1295, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1305. Il est décédé en 1323, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Menteith -Lord of Arran 1271 in Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith 53 und seine Mutter Mary Menteith 47. Er hat vor 1295 in Scotland Helen-nic-Gartnait of Mar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1305 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1323 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Menteith -Lord of Arran è nato il nel 1271 nel Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Mary Menteith, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Helen-nic-Gartnait of Mar prima del 1295, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1305. Morì nel 1323, nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Menteith -Lord of Arranが1271年にイギリススコットランドで生まれた時，父Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteithは53歳，母Mary Menteithは47歳であった。1295年以前にスコットランドでHelen-nic-Gartnait of Marと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1305年に兵役登録をした。彼は1323年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアで52歳で死去し，スコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Menteith -Lord of Arran(이)가 1271년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Menteith(은)는 47세였다. 그는 1295년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Helen-nic-Gartnait of Mar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1305년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1323년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리에 묻혔다.

mn.Menteith, Perthshire, Scotland: Siorrachd Pheairt, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Menteith -Lord of Arran nasceu em 1271, em Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Mary Menteith, tinha 47 anos. Ele casou-se com Helen-nic-Gartnait of Mar antes 1295, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1305. Ele faleceu em 1323, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Menteith -Lord of Arran родился в 1271 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Menteith, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Helen-nic-Gartnait of Mar перед 1295 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1305 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1323 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Menteith -Lord of Arran nació en 1271, en Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Mary Menteith, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Helen-nic-Gartnait of Mar antes de 1295, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1305. Murió en 1323, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.
